summary: Phase 1 prerequisites all verified present; 6 gaps identified — fdb-reflection crate is entirely missing (largest deliverable), forge-identity::verify_and_build() is a todo!() stub, PgBackend::acquire() has no pool or SET LOCAL, sqlx/deadpool-postgres/jsonwebtoken/utoipa missing from workspace, fdb-gateway unwired, all gate tests absent. Nothing from Phase 2 is implemented yet; workspace compiles clean from Phase 1 stubs.
open_questions_for_plan: Should fdb-reflection scaffold (model.rs types only) be created first so p2-c001 and p2-c002 can be parallelized?
Which sqlx version to use — 0.7 vs 0.8? (deadpool-postgres 0.14 requires tokio-postgres 0.7; sqlx 0.8 is independent)
Should jsonwebtoken or a different JWKS-aware crate (e.g., alcoholic_jwt, jwtk) be used for JWKS verification?
